revisedPrompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: Open Dungeon right sidebar category icon, raster PNG
Primary request: Characters category icon: a weathered adventurer portrait medallion with a hooded silhouette, small sword hilt and leather strap details, dungeon-era fantasy tabletop feel, warm torchlit highlights, chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, matching a dark stone dungeon door icon vibe.
Style/medium: painterly game UI icon, crisp silhouette, readable at small size, no text.
Composition/framing: centered single emblem, square icon, generous padding, simple dark stone vignette.
Lighting/mood: amber torch glow, charcoal stone shadows, heroic but grounded.
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no full body scene, no modern objects.
